sn.s: Roberto quiere saber más de mí.
sn.e: Roberto wants to know more about me.
"Tell me about your life," he says.
"I have two brothers and one sister."
"I work with computers. I'm a programmer."
"How nice! And do you like living here?"

sn.s: "Me encanta. La gente es muy cálida."
sn.e: "I love it. The people are very warm."

sn.s: "Aquí ya tenés familia también," dice Roberto.
sn.e: "Here you have family too now," says Roberto.

sn.s: Sus palabras me llegan al corazón.
Hablar de mi vida en español ya no me da miedo.
sn.e: Talking about my life in Spanish no longer scares me.
